headline: AMC Entertainment enters into a $150 million at-the-market equity offering and forward sale agreement to bolster liquidity and fund theater upgrades.
investor_impact: This $150 million equity issuance will cause further dilution for existing shareholders, a recurring headwind for the stock. However, the raised capital is critical for near-term liquidity, allowing the company to manage its heavy debt load and invest in premium large format screens under the AMC GO Plan.
key_figures: Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC, B. Riley Securities, Inc. and Yorkville Securities, LLC acting as sales agents
